varieties.name: Blue Lake Bush
varieties.traits: Compact bush 45-50cm tall, heavy producer, stringless pods 13-15cm long, medium green color
varieties.yield_notes: Very high yielding, 50-55 days to maturity
varieties.availability: Widely available - Yates, Mr Fothergills, Green Harvest, Diggers Club, Eden Seeds, Australian garden centers

varieties.name: Contender
varieties.traits: Bush type 40-45cm tall, early producer, stringless pods 15cm long, dark green
varieties.yield_notes: Heavy crops, 50 days to maturity
varieties.availability: Australian seed companies, online retailers

varieties.name: Provider
varieties.traits: Bush habit 45cm tall, extremely cold-tolerant for a bean, stringless, medium green pods 12-13cm
varieties.yield_notes: Very productive, 50 days to maturity
varieties.availability: The Seed Collection, Australian seed suppliers

varieties.name: Borlotto Dwarf
varieties.traits: Bush bean, ornamental red-flecked pods, red-specked cream seeds
varieties.yield_notes: Good yields, 60-75 days to maturity

varieties.name: Purple King
varieties.traits: Bush type 50cm tall, stunning purple pods turn green when cooked, stringless
varieties.yield_notes: High productivity, 55 days to maturity
varieties.availability: Australian seed suppliers, garden centers

varieties.name: Royal Burgundy
varieties.traits: Bush 50cm tall, deep purple pods, stringless
varieties.yield_notes: Reliable yields, 51 days to maturity
varieties.availability: Seed suppliers, Australian nurseries

varieties.name: Masai
varieties.traits: Very dwarf bush 30cm tall, concentrated pod set at top of plant, stringless
varieties.yield_notes: Very productive for size, 47-55 days to maturity
varieties.availability: Specialty seed suppliers

varieties.name: Blue Lake Climbing
varieties.origin: United States (Upper Missouri American Indians), pre-1800s, also known as White Creaseback or Missouri White Cornfield
varieties.traits: Vigorous climbing vine 2-3m, stringless flattened pods, white seeds
varieties.yield_notes: Very heavy crops over long period, 60-65 days to maturity

varieties.name: Australian Butter
varieties.traits: Climbing butter/wax bean, long deep cream pods, purplish brown seeds
varieties.yield_notes: Productive and reliable

varieties.name: Kentucky Wonder
varieties.traits: Vigorous climbing vines to 2-3m, very prolific, stringless when young
varieties.yield_notes: High-yielding crop over extended period, 60-70 days to maturity

varieties.name: Cobra
varieties.traits: Climbing variety, disease resistant, stringless
varieties.yield_notes: Very productive, 50-75 days to maturity
varieties.availability: Garden centers, online seed suppliers

varieties.name: Romano (Italian)
varieties.traits: Climbing type 2-3m, flat wide pods, stringless
varieties.yield_notes: Excellent yields over long period, 60-70 days to maturity
varieties.availability: Green Harvest, specialty seed suppliers

varieties.name: Snake Bean (Green)
varieties.traits: Vigorous climbing vines 2-3m, long rounded pods 35-75cm, heat and humidity loving
varieties.yield_notes: Heavy crops in warm weather, 60-80 days to maturity
varieties.availability: Mr Fothergills, Local Seeds, Brisbane Asian grocery stores

varieties.name: Red Yardlong Bean
varieties.traits: Climbing vines, bright red pods with green centers, distinctive appearance
varieties.yield_notes: Very productive in warm weather
varieties.availability: Fair Dinkum Seeds, specialty suppliers

varieties.name: Madagascar Bean (Seven Year Bean)
varieties.traits: Vigorous tropical climbing perennial, white seeds with purple speckling, pods contain 2-4 large seeds
varieties.yield_notes: Very productive - abundant crops! More productive after first year, 12-15 weeks to first harvest
varieties.availability: Succeed Heirloom Seeds, tropical garden specialists

varieties.name: Winged Bean (Urizun - Day Neutral)
varieties.origin: Papua New Guinea/Asia, Okinawa variety (Psophocarpus tetragonolobus)
varieties.traits: Climbing perennial (grown as annual), distinctive 4-angled winged pods, blue/purple flowers, entire plant edible
varieties.yield_notes: High yields in warm conditions, flowers 40-140 days after sowing

varieties.name: Lablab Bean (Poor Man's Bean, Dolichos)
varieties.traits: Perennial climbing vine (grown as annual in subtropics), attractive purple flowers, ornamental and edible
varieties.yield_notes: Very high yields 100-120 quintal/ha, dual purpose crop
varieties.availability: Green Harvest, tropical plant specialists

varieties.name: Scarlet Runner Bean
varieties.traits: Perennial vine 2-3m+ (grown as annual in Brisbane), stunning scarlet flowers, ornamental and productive
varieties.yield_notes: Can be very productive under ideal conditions, 65-75 days to maturity

varieties.name: Snake Bean (Phali, Chavali)
varieties.origin: Southeast Asia, widely grown in India
varieties.traits: Vigorous climbing vines, long pods 35-75cm, green, dark purple, or red varieties
varieties.yield_notes: Extremely productive in tropical heat and humidity, 60-80 days to maturity
varieties.availability: Kerala agricultural stores, local markets, Indian seed suppliers

varieties.name: Chinese Long Bean (Green Noodle Bean)
varieties.traits: Climbing annual, long thin pods 30-75cm, light green color
varieties.yield_notes: High yields, fast-growing, ready in 60 days
varieties.availability: Indian seed companies, Asian vegetable seed suppliers

varieties.name: Avarekalu/Mochai (Hyacinth Bean/Field Bean) 🌏
varieties.origin: India - center of origin, ancient crop dating back thousands of years
varieties.traits: Perennial climbing vine (grown as annual), photo-sensitive pole types, white/pink/purple flowers, pods vary in size and color
varieties.yield_notes: Very high yields 5-8 t/ha green pods, 100-120 quintal/ha total

varieties.name: CO 1 (Hyacinth Bean)
varieties.traits: Bush variety, photo-insensitive, bears pods in bunches, uniform maturity
varieties.yield_notes: High yielding bush variety
varieties.availability: Tamil Nadu Agricultural University, Indian agricultural stores

varieties.name: CO 2 (Hyacinth Bean)
varieties.traits: Improved variety, specific characteristics for commercial production
varieties.yield_notes: High commercial yields
varieties.availability: Tamil Nadu Agricultural University, agricultural extension offices

varieties.name: Pusa Early Prolific (Hyacinth Bean)
varieties.origin: IARI (Indian Agricultural Research Institute), New Delhi
varieties.traits: Early maturing variety, bush type
varieties.yield_notes: Prolific early production
varieties.availability: IARI, Indian agricultural seed companies, Kerala Krishi Bhavan

varieties.name: Pusa Sem 2 & Pusa Sem 3 (Hyacinth Bean)
varieties.traits: Improved bush varieties, disease resistant
varieties.yield_notes: High yielding improved varieties
varieties.availability: IARI, agricultural extension services throughout Kerala

varieties.name: Arka Komal
varieties.origin: IIHR (Indian Institute of Horticultural Research), Bengaluru
varieties.traits: Bush variety, photo-insensitive, stringless pods, smooth surface
varieties.yield_notes: Suitable for both rabi and summer seasons
varieties.availability: IIHR Bengaluru, Karnataka/Kerala agricultural stores

varieties.name: Arka Sharath
varieties.origin: IIHR Bengaluru - cross between Arka Bold x Arka Komal
varieties.traits: Bush variety, photo-insensitive, resistant to both rust and bacterial blight
varieties.yield_notes: Good yields with disease resistance
varieties.availability: IIHR, Kerala Krishi Bhavan, agricultural universities

varieties.name: Arka Suvidha (Pole Bean)
varieties.origin: IIHR Bengaluru - high yielding rust-resistant pole variety
varieties.traits: Indeterminate climbing vines 2m+ tall, rust resistant
varieties.yield_notes: Very high yielding 24 t/ha in 100 days, first harvest 60 days
varieties.availability: IIHR, Kerala agricultural extension

varieties.name: Contender (Kerala)
varieties.origin: United States, 1949 - widely grown in India
varieties.traits: Bush type, early maturing, stringless, disease resistant
varieties.yield_notes: Good yields, 50 days to maturity

varieties.name: Winged Bean (Four-Angled Bean, Goa Bean)
varieties.origin: Papua New Guinea, Mauritius, Madagascar, India - indigenous to region
varieties.traits: Perennial climbing vine (annual in cultivation), distinctive 4-angled winged pods, entire plant edible, blue/purple flowers
varieties.yield_notes: High yields in optimal tropical conditions, supermarket-on-a-stalk
varieties.availability: Kerala farmers, local agricultural communities, AVDRC (World Vegetable Center), tropical seed specialists

varieties.name: Guar/Cluster Bean (Kothavarangai)
varieties.origin: India, Pakistan - domesticated in Indian subcontinent
varieties.traits: Annual bushy plant, pods grow in clusters, drought tolerant
varieties.yield_notes: Good yields, tolerates dry conditions
varieties.availability: Indian agricultural stores, Kerala seed suppliers

varieties.name: Sword Bean (Canavalia gladiata)
varieties.traits: Perennial tropical climber (grown as annual), can grow 3m tall, needs strong support, pink/red/white or speckled varieties
varieties.yield_notes: HUGE yields, more productive in first year
varieties.availability: Tropical seed specialists, sometimes available locally in Kerala

varieties.name: Jack Bean (Canavalia ensiformis)
varieties.origin: Central America, widely grown in tropics
varieties.traits: Large vigorous annual vine, very hardy, nitrogen fixing
varieties.yield_notes: Very high yields, also excellent for green manure
varieties.availability: Sheffield's Seeds, tropical crop suppliers

varieties.name: Avare (Chikkadikai, Karnataka/Tamil)
varieties.origin: South India - Lablab purpureus traditional variety
varieties.traits: Traditional South Indian variety of lablab bean
varieties.yield_notes: Traditional yields, landrace variety

varieties.name: Broad Bean/Fava Bean
varieties.traits: Cool season crop, upright bushy plants, large pods
varieties.yield_notes: Good in cool climates
varieties.availability: Limited availability in Kerala, better sourced from cooler climate regions

varieties.name: Kenya (French Bean)
varieties.traits: Bush variety, heat tolerant, disease resistant
varieties.yield_notes: Good yields in tropical conditions
